title: SOC-CMM 2.4.2 Basic SIEM implementation profile
author: Rob van Os
adaptationNotice: Adapted for TriSOC from SOC-CMM 2.4.2 Basic. The workbook remains the authoritative questionnaire; this profile records its 27 aspect results and adds a deterministic deployment gate for the Log Management and Log Monitoring content. Missing responses or evidence are treated as incomplete.

siemImplementationControls.name: Documented log-management process
siemImplementationControls.description: A defined and maintained log-management process exists.

siemImplementationControls.name: Log-source inventory
siemImplementationControls.description: Required data sources and owners are identified and documented.

siemImplementationControls.name: Collection design
siemImplementationControls.description: Collection paths, agents, APIs, failure handling, and health monitoring are defined.

siemImplementationControls.name: Filtering policy
siemImplementationControls.description: Intentional filtering is documented, reviewed, and does not remove required security evidence.

siemImplementationControls.name: Normalisation policy
siemImplementationControls.description: Events are mapped to the platform-native security schema and mapping quality is validated.

siemImplementationControls.name: Retention policy
siemImplementationControls.description: Retention is risk-based, compliant with obligations, and enforced by the platform.

siemImplementationControls.name: Backup and restore
siemImplementationControls.description: Backup and restoration requirements are documented and tested where applicable.

siemImplementationControls.name: Archival
siemImplementationControls.description: Long-term archival requirements, integrity, access, and retrieval are defined.

siemImplementationControls.name: Secure disposal
siemImplementationControls.description: Logs are disposed of according to policy after retention obligations are met.

siemImplementationControls.name: Search and analysis
siemImplementationControls.description: Authorised analysts can reliably search, correlate, and analyse retained telemetry.

siemImplementationControls.name: Sensitive-data handling
siemImplementationControls.description: Personal, secret, regulated, and other sensitive values are minimised and protected.

siemImplementationControls.name: Corporate logging policy
siemImplementationControls.description: The log-management process is backed by an approved organisational policy.

siemImplementationControls.name: Central log platform
siemImplementationControls.description: Security-relevant telemetry is centrally managed in the SIEM or an integrated log platform.

siemImplementationControls.name: Standards and regulatory alignment
siemImplementationControls.description: Logging design maps to applicable standards, contractual duties, and regulations.

siemImplementationControls.name: Stakeholder alignment
siemImplementationControls.description: Security, privacy, legal, operations, and system owners approve relevant logging requirements.

siemImplementationControls.name: Encryption in transit
siemImplementationControls.description: Log transport is authenticated and encrypted.

siemImplementationControls.name: Protection in use
siemImplementationControls.description: Access paths and processing environments protect log data while it is being used.

siemImplementationControls.name: Encryption at rest
siemImplementationControls.description: Stored logs, archives, and backups are encrypted with governed keys.

siemImplementationControls.name: Restricted access
siemImplementationControls.description: Least privilege, separation of duties, and reviewable access protect log data.

siemImplementationControls.name: Platform ownership
siemImplementationControls.description: Accountable service and technical owners are assigned to the log-monitoring platform.

siemImplementationControls.name: Platform documentation
siemImplementationControls.description: Architecture, configuration, integrations, operating procedures, and recovery are documented.

siemImplementationControls.name: Support readiness
siemImplementationControls.description: Administrators and analysts are trained and an appropriate support arrangement exists.

siemImplementationControls.name: Maintenance and change control
siemImplementationControls.description: Updates, trusted tooling, maintenance windows, and changes are governed and tested.

siemImplementationControls.name: High availability
siemImplementationControls.description: The architecture eliminates unacceptable single points of failure and monitors service health.

siemImplementationControls.name: Backup and replication
siemImplementationControls.description: Configuration and required data are backed up or replicated consistent with recovery objectives.

siemImplementationControls.name: Disaster recovery
siemImplementationControls.description: Recovery objectives and procedures are implemented and exercised.

siemImplementationControls.name: Non-production validation
siemImplementationControls.description: Material changes, parsers, and detections can be validated outside production.

siemImplementationControls.name: Access review
siemImplementationControls.description: Privileged and analyst access is least-privileged, logged, and periodically reviewed.

siemImplementationControls.name: Emergency access
siemImplementationControls.description: Break-glass access is protected, monitored, time-bounded, and tested.

siemImplementationControls.name: Detection and alerting
siemImplementationControls.description: The platform detects subtle security events and creates actionable alerts automatically.

siemImplementationControls.name: Acknowledgement and case management
siemImplementationControls.description: Alerts can be acknowledged, assigned, tracked, and linked to incident workflows.

siemImplementationControls.name: Analyst audit trail and historical detection
siemImplementationControls.description: Analyst activity is auditable and historical telemetry can be re-evaluated for new detections.

siemImplementationControls.name: Flexible scalable architecture
siemImplementationControls.description: Capacity, performance, integrations, and growth are engineered and monitored.

siemImplementationControls.name: MITRE ATT&CK mapping
siemImplementationControls.description: Detection and investigation content can be tagged and reported against ATT&CK.

siemImplementationControls.name: Aggregation and normalisation
siemImplementationControls.description: Multiple event sources are aggregated and normalised into platform-native schemas.

siemImplementationControls.name: Correlation
siemImplementationControls.description: The platform supports cross-source and multi-stage correlation.

siemImplementationControls.name: Custom parsing and APIs
siemImplementationControls.description: Custom parsers and governed APIs support sources that lack native integrations.

siemImplementationControls.name: Secure transport options
siemImplementationControls.description: Multiple supported transport methods provide authenticated and encrypted ingestion.

siemImplementationControls.name: Context integrations
siemImplementationControls.description: The SIEM integrates asset, business, identity, vulnerability, and threat-intelligence context.

siemImplementationControls.name: Security workflow integrations
siemImplementationControls.description: Threat hunting, incident response, forensics, and automation workflows interoperate with the SIEM.

siemImplementationControls.name: Standard and custom rules
siemImplementationControls.description: Reviewed standard content and organisation-specific rules are supported and governed.

siemImplementationControls.name: Anomaly detection
siemImplementationControls.description: User, application, device, and network anomalies can be detected and investigated.

siemImplementationControls.name: Reporting and dashboards
siemImplementationControls.description: Operational, risk, compliance, and detection-health reporting is available.

siemImplementationControls.name: Visualisation and drill-down
siemImplementationControls.description: Analysts can move from summaries to the underlying evidence without losing context.

siemImplementationControls.name: Central console and advanced search
siemImplementationControls.description: A central analyst experience provides powerful, governed search across retained telemetry.
